title: 02808_TRAK_Attributing_Model_Behavior_at_Scale
positive_examples: TRAK can improve the quality of training data, which generally enhances model performance.
TRAK is useful in applications such as explaining predictions, debugging model behavior, and detecting poisoned or mislabeled data.
negative_examples: The reliance on large datasets for training may lead to privacy risks if sensitive data is included.
The computational demands of training models, even with TRAK's efficiency, could contribute to increased energy consumption.
